zh.Nether Middleton, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆米德萊頓 在 哈特勒普爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Killinghall於大約1442年出生在英國達勒姆米德萊頓 在 哈特勒普爾時，她的父親John Killinghall Jr., Esq.31歲，母親Elisabeth Ann Perkinson26歲。她於1465年3月3日與Thomas Blakiston Esq.在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1483年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年42歲。

zh-hans.Nether Middleton, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆米德萊頓 在 哈特勒普爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Killinghall于大约1442年出生在英国達勒姆米德萊頓 在 哈特勒普爾时，她的父亲John Killinghall Jr., Esq.31岁，母亲Elisabeth Ann Perkinson26岁。她于1465年3月3日与Thomas Blakiston Esq.在英国達勒姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1483年在英国英格兰倫敦享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Killinghall was born about 1442, in Middleton in Hartlepool, Durham, England, her father, John Killinghall Jr., Esq., was 31 and her mother, Elisabeth Ann Perkinson, was 26. She married Thomas Blakiston Esq. on 3 March 1465, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1483, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Killinghall est née environ 1442, à Middleton in Hartlepool, Durham, Angleterre, son père, John Killinghall Jr., Esq., avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Ann Perkinson, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Blakiston Esq. le 3 mars 1465, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1483, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Killinghall um 1442 in Middleton in Hartlepool, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Killinghall Jr., Esq. 31 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth Ann Perkinson 26. Sie hat am 3. März 1465 in Durham, England Thomas Blakiston Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1483 im Alter von 42 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Killinghall è nata il circa 1442 nel Middleton in Hartlepool, Durham, England, sua padre, John Killinghall Jr., Esq., aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth Ann Perkinson, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Blakiston Esq. il 3 marzo 1465, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1483, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Nether Middleton, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムミッドレトン イン ハートレプオオル

イギリスイギリスダルハム
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Killinghallが約1442年にイギリスダルハムミッドレトン イン ハートレプオオルで生まれた時，父John Killinghall Jr., Esq.は31歳，母Elisabeth Ann Perkinsonは26歳であった。1465年3月3日にイギリスダルハムでThomas Blakiston Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1483年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Killinghall(이)가 대략 1442년 영국 뒤람 미들레턴 인 하틀레포에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Killinghall Jr., Esq.(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth Ann Perkinson(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1465년 3월 3일 영국 뒤람에서 Thomas Blakiston Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Killinghall nasceu aproximadamente 1442, em Middleton in Hartlepool, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Killinghall Jr., Esq., tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Ann Perkinson, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Blakiston Esq. em 3 de março de 1465, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1483, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Killinghall родилась около 1442 г. в местности миддлетон ин хартлепул, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени John Killinghall Jr., Esq. было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Ann Perkinson, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Blakiston Esq. 3 марта 1465 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1483 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Killinghall nació aproximadamente 1442, en Middleton in Hartlepool, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, John Killinghall Jr., Esq., tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Ann Perkinson, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Thomas Blakiston Esq. el 3 de marzo de 1465, en Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1483, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
